XONLINE_ARB_SUSPICIOUS_INFO

Contains data about suspicious activity during an arbitrated session.

typedef struct{
    CHAR *pszMessage;
    BYTE bNumRelatedAddresses;
    XNADDR *pxnaddrRelatedAddresses;
    BYTE bNumRelatedUsers;
    XUID *pxuidRelatedUsers;
} XONLINE_ARB_SUSPICIOUS_INFO, *PXONLINE_ARB_SUSPICIOUS_INFO;

Members

pszMessage
String containing a description of the suspicious activity. Must be less than XONLINE_ARB_MAX_SUSPICIOUS_INFO_MESSAGE_LENGTH ANSI characters in length, not including the terminating null character.
bNumRelatedAddresses
Number of addresses involved in the suspicious activity.
pxnaddrRelatedAddresses
Array of addresses involved in the suspicious activity.
bNumRelatedUsers
Number of players involved in the suspicious activity.
pxuidRelatedUsers
Array of IDs of players involved in the suspicious activity.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also

XONLINE_ARB_REPORT_DATA, XOnlineArbitrationReport
